source_pr.title: stats: add average column size for the histogram
source_pr.body:
For fixed-length data types, such as Int and DateTime, the _avg_col_size_ will equal to the fixed-length. For variable-length data types, such as varchar, it will equal to the average column size in bytes.
#4800 
PTAL @lamxTyler @coocood

symptoms: // We copy it before writing to avoid race.
failure_signature: // We copy it before writing to avoid race.
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: Although the patch context contains a comment mentioning "avoid race", this PR is primarily a statistics feature/correctness change (avg column size for histogram) and the case lacks a concrete flaky-test failure signature and targeted stabilization rationale. We avoid guessing a data-race root cause category from a context comment.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).
